role: IRGC Missile Operations officer, embedded with Hezbollah (d. 12 March 2026)
bio: Abuzar Mohammadi was an [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) Missile Operations officer who was embedded with [Hezbollah](/orgs/hezbollah) in Lebanon, serving as a technical and operational liaison for Iranian missile systems transferred to the Lebanese militia. He was killed on 12 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: IRGC Missile Officer Embedded with Hezbollah Killed

editorial_notes: Killed 12 March 2026. IRGC Missile Operations officer embedded with Hezbollah.
